description: Style Note Lend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief shoes. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which won't burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear. Product Details Caramel brown mid top shoe with central lace-ups and a padded tongue (has stitch detail at the seams of the toe box) Padded inner and a thick rubber midsole TPU outsole with an arched midfoot, an upraised heel and multidirectional lugs all over Material and Care Leather Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not store under direct sunlight
